title: nestegis lanceolata
intro: Nestegis lanceolata, also known as New Zealand Christmas tree, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nestegis lanceolata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Nestegis lanceolata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
